testcase.name: test_f1_08_delete_device
testcase.failure: tests\test_acceptance_functional.py:145: in test_f1_08_delete_device assert resp.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500 Internal Server Error]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_f2_02_create_rule
testcase.failure: tests\test_acceptance_functional.py:213: in test_f2_02_create_rule assert resp.status_code in (200, 201) E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422 Unprocessable Entity]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_f2_03_get_rule

auth=auth, follow_redirects=follow_redirects) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_client.py:1674: in send response = await self._send_handling_auth( D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_client.py:1702: in _send_handling_auth response = await self._send_handling_redirects( D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_client.py:1739: in _send_handling_redirects response = await self._send_single_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_client.py:1776: in _send_single_request response = await transport.handle_async_request(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\httpx\_transports\asgi.py:157: in handle_async_request await self.app(scope, receive, send) D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\fastapi\applications.py:1054: in __call__ await super().__call__(scope, receive, send) D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\starlette\applications.py:123: in __call__ await self.middleware_stack(scope, receive, send) D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\starlette\middleware\errors.py:186: in __call__ raise exc D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\starlette\middleware\errors.py:164: in __call__ await self.app(scope, receive, _send) D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\starlette\middleware\cors.py:83: in __call__ await self.app(scope, receive, send) D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\starlette\middleware\exceptions.py:62: in __call__ await wrap_app_handling_exceptions(self.app, conn)(scope, receive, send) D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\starlette\_exception_handler.py:64: in wrapped_app raise exc D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\starlette\_exception_handler.py:53: in wrapped_app await app(scope, receive, sender) D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\starlette\routing.py:762: in __call__ await self.middleware_stack(scope, receive, send) D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\starlette\routing.py:782: in app await route.handle(scope, receive, send) D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\starlette\routing.py:297: in handle await self.app(scope, receive, send) D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\starlette\routing.py:77: in app await wrap_app_handling_exceptions(app, request)(scope, receive, send) D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\starlette\_exception_handler.py:64: in wrapped_app raise exc D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\starlette\_exception_handler.py:53: in wrapped_app await app(scope, receive, sender) D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\starlette\routing.py:72: in app response = await func(request) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\fastapi\routing.py:315: in app content = await serialize_response( D:\os\Python312\Lib\site-packages\fastapi\routing.py:155: in serialize_response raise ResponseValidationError( E fastapi.exceptions.ResponseValidationError: 5 validation errors: E {'type': 'missing', 'loc': ('response', 'data', 'conditions'), 'msg': 'Field required', 'input': {'rule_id': 'test-rule-01', 'name': '高温告警', 'device_id': 'test-device-01', 'rule_type': 'threshold', 'severity': 'critical', 'enabled': True, 'condition': {'point_name': 'temperature', 'operator': '>', 'threshold': 80}, 'created_by': 'test-admin'}, 'url': 'https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.6/v/missing'} E {'type': 'missing', 'loc': ('response', 'data', 'logic'), 'msg': 'Field required', 'input': {'rule_id': 'test-rule-01', 'name': '高温告警', 'device_id':
